productDisplayName: Hugo Men Just Different 100 ml Perfume
description: Style Note hugo from the house of hugo boss guarantees perfumes that you will fall in love with. With fragrances that last long and keeps you feeling fresh all day, these perfumes for men are proud inclusions in your perfume collection. Hugo Just Different with its vibrant scent comes in an innovative flask which is inspired by shape of an army water flask. The opaque matt finish flask gives it a mysterious aura . Product Details Hugo Just Different is a spray perfume for men which comes in a opaque glass flask The top note is ice cold mint, middle notes are basil and freesia and base note is cashmeran Caution Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying in eyes Size 100 ml
